# dating.rate_through_time_binned { #tspaint.dating.rate_through_time_binned }

```python
tspaint.dating.rate_through_time_binned(
    ts,
    labels,
    edges,
    *,
    max_iter=8,
    Q0=None,
    estimate_pi=False,
    soft_refs=None,
)
```

Stage-1 admixture-rate-through-time profile: fit a homogeneous ``Q``, then bin the
per-branch sufficient statistics by time.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``centers`` (cell centres), ``q_AB``/``q_BA`` (directional rate per cell = ``jumps/dwell``), ``D``/``J`` (raw per-cell dwell/jumps), and the fitted ``Q``.
